## Full template/skill.md Checklist Audit

> Walk **every section** of `template/skill.md` and verify each checkbox against the built
> service. Do not skip sections. Mark each item `[x]`, `[ ]`, `[N/A]`, or `[⚠️]`.
> For items marked `[⚠️]` or `[ ]`, include a brief explanation.

### Coding Practices (developer-agent/skill.md + template/skill.md)

> For each item, grep the source code and verify compliance. Items marked with
> a `grep` command are mechanically verifiable. Items without are verified by
> code review / inspection.

#### Code Clarity and Design

- [ ] Code is understandable without asking the author — no clever tricks
- [ ] No overengineering or over-abstraction — simplicity is key
- [ ] No invented patterns — all patterns match existing codebase conventions
- [ ] Functions do one thing — prefer explicit over implicit
- [ ] Fail fast and fail loud — no swallowed errors, no empty defaults, no log-and-continue — `grep -rn "except.*pass$\|except.*continue$" src/`
- [ ] No dead code or commented-out blocks — `grep -rn "^#.*def \|^#.*class \|^#.*import " src/`

#### Imports and Dependencies

- [ ] All imports at top of file — `grep` for `import` inside function bodies (exclude lazy-load of external modules with justification)
- [ ] PEP 8 import ordering: (1) stdlib, (2) third-party, (3) local — verify per file
- [ ] No circular imports at runtime
- [ ] Pin dependency versions — check `requirements.txt` for pinned versions
- [ ] No unused dependencies — `pip-audit` + manual review

#### Naming and Style

- [ ] All constants UPPER_CASE (e.g., `MAX_RETRIES`, `DEFAULT_TIMEOUT`)
- [ ] Do not shadow global variables or constants inside function calls
- [ ] Minimize mutable global variables; pass state through function arguments, class instances, or DI — `grep -rn "^global \|^\s\+global " src/`
- [ ] All functions, classes, and modules have docstrings — confirmed by `interrogate`
- [ ] Use f-strings instead of `%` formatting or `.format()` — `grep "\.format(\|% [sd\"'(]" src/`

#### Type Safety

- [ ] Match expected types exactly — confirmed by mypy 0 errors
- [ ] Verify argument types against function signatures
- [ ] When integrating with external modules (kafka_module, rds_module), read type hints
- [ ] Do not write equality checks that can never be true
- [ ] Match framework function signatures exactly (e.g., FastAPI `lifespan` signature)
- [ ] Always parameterize generic types — `grep ": dict\b\|: list\b\|-> dict\b\|-> list\b" src/`
- [ ] No `# type: ignore` comments anywhere — `grep "# type: ignore" src/`
- [ ] Run `mypy` as type-mismatch safety net

#### Linter Discipline

- [ ] Resolve linter errors instead of ignoring them — `grep "# pylint: disable\|# type: ignore\|# noqa" src/`
- [ ] No suppression comments without justification — count and document each

#### Error Handling and Security

- [ ] Handle errors at the boundary where you can act on them
- [ ] Distinguish retryable from fatal errors
- [ ] Validate all external input — trust nothing that crosses a boundary
- [ ] Never commit secrets, tokens, or credentials — `grep -ri "password\|secret\|token\|api_key" src/ --include="*.py"` (verify only env var refs, no hardcoded values)
- [ ] `.env.example` exists with documented variables; no `.env` files committed — verify `.gitignore` has `.env`
- [ ] Least privilege everywhere — database users, API keys, IAM roles
- [ ] Always specify encoding with `open()` — `grep "open(" src/ --include="*.py"` (verify `encoding=` present)
- [ ] Set timeouts on every external call — `grep -rn "requests\.\|httpx\.\|urlopen" src/` (verify `timeout=` present)

#### Standing Orders

- [ ] No DP2.5 or Stackdriver references — `grep -ri "dp2.5\|stackdriver\|stack_driver" src/`
- [ ] DAPR sidecar only — no DAPR client libraries in application code — `grep -ri "dapr" src/ --include="*.py"`
- [ ] No SRE Agent config for library repos (N/A for deployable services)

### Section 1: Dependency Management

- [ ] `pyproject.toml` defines runtime deps with pinned versions under `[project] dependencies`
- [ ] `pyproject.toml` defines dev deps under `[project.optional-dependencies] dev`
- [ ] Dev deps include: pytest, pytest-cov, pylint, black, mypy, complexipy, pip-tools, coverage[toml]
- [ ] `pip-tools` used for lock file generation (not `pip freeze`)
- [ ] `scripts/lock.sh` exists and matches template pattern
- [ ] `requirements.txt` committed — verify header says `autogenerated by pip-compile`
- [ ] `requirements-dev.txt` committed — verify header says `autogenerated by pip-compile`
- [ ] `lock.sh` pins pip, setuptools, pip-tools versions before compiling
- [ ] `[build-system]` requires `setuptools>=78` with `setuptools.build_meta` backend

### Section 2: Required Development Tooling

- [ ] `[tool.black]` section: `line-length = 88`, `target-version = ['py312']`, `skip-string-normalization = true`
- [ ] `[tool.mypy]` section: `ignore_missing_imports = true`
- [ ] `.pylintrc` `[MASTER]` init-hook adds current directory to sys.path
- [ ] `.pylintrc` `[MESSAGES CONTROL]` disable list includes: C0116, C0114, C0115, R0903, R0913, R0917, W0602, W1203, W1202, W0511, R0401, W0718
- [ ] `pytest.ini` exists with coverage config
- [ ] `norecursedirs` excludes `cntools_py3 cnlib`
- [ ] `env` sets `OTEL_SDK_DISABLED=true`
- [ ] `filterwarnings` ignores `DeprecationWarning`

### Section 3: Dockerfile Pattern

- [ ] Base image: `python:3.12-bookworm`
- [ ] CVE-pinned system packages
- [ ] Purge unnecessary packages
- [ ] Copy application source and requirements.txt
- [ ] Upgrade pip and setuptools to pinned versions
- [ ] Install requirements from `requirements.txt`
- [ ] Install cnlib (or N/A with justification)
- [ ] Set `PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1`
- [ ] Set `OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_COMPRESSION="gzip"`
- [ ] Run `opentelemetry-bootstrap`
- [ ] Copy `entrypoint.sh` and `environment-check.sh` to `/usr/local/bin/` and `chmod +x`
- [ ] `EXPOSE 8000`
- [ ] Non-root user: `containeruser` with UID/GID `10000`
- [ ] `HEALTHCHECK` on `http://localhost:8000/status`
- [ ] `ENTRYPOINT ["/usr/local/bin/entrypoint.sh"]`

### Section 4: entrypoint.sh Pattern

- [ ] `#!/bin/bash` with `set -eu pipefail`
- [ ] Sources `environment-check.sh`
- [ ] Creates AWS config file
- [ ] Exports and logs `OTEL_PYTHON_AUTO_INSTRUMENTATION_ENABLED`
- [ ] Conditional OTEL setup
- [ ] Starts uvicorn with correct module path

### Section 5: environment-check.sh Pattern

- [ ] `#!/bin/bash` (no `set -e`)
- [ ] Defines `always_required_vars` array
- [ ] Defines optional variable groups as needed
- [ ] `ENV` validated first
- [ ] `TEST_CONTAINER=true` logic (only `ENV=dev`, disables OTEL)
- [ ] Non-test path checks all required + conditional variable groups
- [ ] OTEL debug mode when `LOG_LEVEL=debug`
- [ ] Final check reports unset variables and exits non-zero

### Section 6: Application Structure

- [ ] OTEL TracerProvider, MeterProvider, and LoggerProvider configured
- [ ] LoggerProvider with `BatchLogRecordProcessor` and `OTLPLogExporter`
- [ ] MeterProvider with `PeriodicExportingMetricReader` and `OTLPMetricExporter`
- [ ] TracerProvider with `BatchSpanProcessor` and `OTLPSpanExporter`
- [ ] `Resource.create({"service.name": service_name})`
- [ ] `FastAPIInstrumentor.instrument_app(app)`
- [ ] `compute_valid_log_level()` function
- [ ] `configure_logging()` function (or N/A if cnlib removed)
- [ ] `lifespan` async context manager
- [ ] `create_app()` factory function
- [ ] `main.py` minimal entry point
- [ ] `APIRouter()` instances in route files
- [ ] `/status` returns `PlainTextResponse('OK')`
- [ ] `/health` with dependency checks
- [ ] OTEL tracer via `trace.get_tracer(__name__)` in API routers
- [ ] OTEL metrics counter for request counting
- [ ] `log_request_middleware` — logs requests, skips `/status` and `/health`

### Section 7: GitHub Workflows

- [ ] CI pipeline file (commit.yml or ci.yml)
- [ ] `comment-build-push-container.yaml`
- [ ] `master-build-push-container.yaml`
- [ ] `pre-release-build-push-container.yaml`
- [ ] `enforce-gitflow.yaml`
- [ ] `pod-identity-manager.yml`
- [ ] CI jobs: black, pytest, pylint, complexipy, mypy, helm_lint, helm_template, helm_unittest, build-and-test-container
- [ ] Multi-arch builds (`linux/amd64,linux/arm64`)
- [ ] Image tag format: `{app}-{branch}-{sha}`
- [ ] `.github/scripts/pod-identity-generator/` directory
- [ ] `.github/scripts/workflow-runner.sh`

### Section 8: Git Hooks

- [ ] `hooks/pre-commit` exists with all quality gates in order
- [ ] Hook enabled via `git config core.hooksPath hooks`
- [ ] Colored output, exits non-zero on failure

### Section 9: Helm Charts

- [ ] All 18+ template files present (list each)
- [ ] `charts/Chart.yaml` — correct name, apiVersion v2
- [ ] `charts/values.yaml` — environment config, resources, probes
- [ ] `charts/tests/` directory with unittest YAML files
- [ ] `tests/test-helm-template.sh` covers dev, qa, prod, PR

### Section 10: Required Files Checklist

- [ ] `.actrc`, `.gitignore`, `.pylintrc`, `.python-version`
- [ ] `Dockerfile`, `README.md`, `catalog-info.yaml`
- [ ] `entrypoint.sh`, `env.list`, `environment-check.sh`
- [ ] `hooks/pre-commit`, `monitored-paths.txt`
- [ ] `pyproject.toml`, `pytest.ini`
- [ ] `requirements.txt`, `requirements-dev.txt`
- [ ] `scripts/lock.sh`, `tests/test-helm-template.sh`

### Section 11: Environment Variables

- [ ] Always required: ENV, LOG_LEVEL, AWS_REGION, TEST_CONTAINER, SERVICE_NAME, OTEL_PYTHON_AUTO_INSTRUMENTATION_ENABLED
- [ ] OTEL variables defined in `environment-check.sh`
- [ ] `env.list` matches template reference

### Section 12: Local Development

- [ ] Python 3.12 venv
- [ ] Install dev deps
- [ ] Install cnlib or local modules
- [ ] Run tests: `pytest`
- [ ] Run locally via Docker documented
- [ ] `curl /status` returns `OK`
- [ ] Git hooks documented

### Section 13: CVE Management

- [ ] `cves/` directory exists
- [ ] System packages pinned in Dockerfile
- [ ] pip and setuptools upgraded to CVE-safe versions
